children.text: A national test for admission to an institution of higher learning as described in the last sentence of section 3452(b).
A national test providing an opportunity for course credit at an institution of higher learning as so described.
A national test that evaluates prior learning and knowledge and provides an opportunity for course credit at an institution of higher learning as so described.
the fee charged for the test; or
the amount of entitlement available to the individual under this chapter at the time of payment for the test under this section.
for the academic year beginning on , $1,460; orAugust 1, 2011

for an academic year beginning on any subsequent August 1, the amount for the previous academic year beginning on August 1 under this subsection, as increased by the percentage increase equal to the most recent percentage increase determined under section 3015(h).
